name: @ai-ds/core
description: AICADS pattern manifest — distributable blocks, spacing recipes, and page templates for AI/Replit assemblers.

marketing.hero.centered.whenToUse: Landing page above-the-fold with primary and secondary CTA

marketing.hero.split.whenToUse: Split hero with media column and optional stats row

marketing.hero.enterprise.whenToUse: B2B enterprise above-fold — split stage (headline + CTA + media), bottom metrics band with inline description (Cortel-style)

marketing.hero.page.whenToUse: Inner page hero — breadcrumb trail, category badge, and display title on brand band (case study / detail pages)

marketing.navbar.sticky.whenToUse: Top navigation with logo, links, and optional CTA

marketing.navbar.enterprise.whenToUse: Sticky overlay navbar with phone block, account/lead CTAs, static social rail below header, and tabbed services mega menu (desktop/tablet/mobile drawer)

marketing.logos.cloud.whenToUse: Social proof logo strip below hero

marketing.stats.band.whenToUse: Key metrics band on brand background

marketing.features.grid.whenToUse: Feature grid with 2 or 3 columns and optional icons

marketing.pricing.three-tier.whenToUse: Three-tier pricing comparison with highlighted plan

marketing.testimonials.grid.whenToUse: Customer quotes in a responsive grid

marketing.faq.accordion.whenToUse: FAQ section with collapsible answers — default compact accordion

marketing.faq.enterprise.whenToUse: FAQ card accordion — muted rounded items, plus toggle button, Cortel vmware landing

marketing.cta.band.whenToUse: Full-width brand CTA band before footer

marketing.newsletter.inline.whenToUse: Email capture with inline input and submit

marketing.events.featured.whenToUse: Brand band after hero — split layout with carousel nav, format/date tags, and event title

marketing.services.catalog.whenToUse: Services/practices catalog — sticky title + category tabs, 3-card grid, show-more pagination, hover lift cards

marketing.solutions.showcase.whenToUse: Case study showcase — muted band, 2-row mosaic grid (3 equal + 6/3/3), mobile scroll strip, inverse hover reveal with brand gradient cover

marketing.solutions.grid.whenToUse: Case detail related projects — equal 3-col SolutionCard grid with category/client/date meta, no mosaic spans

marketing.solutions.catalog.whenToUse: Solutions catalog page — hero muted panel (variant solutions) + equal 3-col bordered cards with icon, title, description, arrow CTA on hover

marketing.trust.security.whenToUse: Reliability band — featured brand pillar + 3 white cards, gradient divider, sidebar + 3-col standards link grid

marketing.support.always-on.whenToUse: Support band — split header, image stat cards (featured + 2 side), contact channel rows; mobile stacked stats hero

marketing.showcase.panel.whenToUse: Interactive product panel — flex accordion cards on the left (expand/push in fixed frame), crossfade UI preview on the right; mobile inline preview per panel

marketing.blog.slider.whenToUse: Blog band — split header with view-all + prev/next, horizontal card slider with image, excerpt fade, date pill and arrow link; mobile edge-bleed scroll

marketing.partners.marquee.whenToUse: Strategic partners band — centered title, dual infinite marquee rows (opposite directions), white logo tiles with grayscale-to-color hover, edge gradient fades

marketing.contact.hero.whenToUse: Brand contact hero — parallax background, split title + glass form (name, phone, company), white submit CTA, consent checkbox

marketing.auth.login.whenToUse: Auth login — Cortel console split-screen: brand decor panel + white form panel, left-aligned logo/title, login/password, remember+forgot row, submit, registration hint, legal footer links

marketing.app-shell.whenToUse: Dashboard app shell — fixed sidebar nav + top bar (storage context, user) + scrollable main; mobile horizontal nav pills

marketing.monitoring.workspace.whenToUse: LK monitoring panel — full-width ShowcasePanel monitoring UI (modes, metrics, resources, alerts) without marketing accordion

marketing.cabinet.stats-strip.whenToUse: Cabinet KPI row — compact 4-tile telemetry strip (surface-2 cards) for overview dashboard

marketing.admin.content-list.whenToUse: Admin content index — searchable table of cases or events with create/edit/delete actions

marketing.admin.content-editor.whenToUse: Shared schema editor — anchor-nav sections for case (hero/intro/stats/narrative) or event (card/body) drafts

marketing.admin.users.whenToUse: Admin user management — generate/change/send passwords, add users (front-only mock)

marketing.admin.partners.whenToUse: Partner logo CRUD — upload preview grid with add/remove (local state only)

marketing.case-detail.intro.whenToUse: Case study intro — lead prose, 2-col highlight metrics, trail paragraph (embedded in article shell on detail page)

marketing.case-detail.inline-stats.whenToUse: Case study business results — h2 + gray stat cards in 2-col grid inside article column

marketing.case-detail.implemented.whenToUse: Case study implemented list — h2 + intro paragraph + plain bullet list, no feature cards

marketing.case-detail.sections.whenToUse: Case study narrative — repeatable h2 sections with prose, bullet lists, pull quotes

marketing.case-detail.anchor-nav.whenToUse: Case study sticky anchor nav — left column pill links with scroll-spy active state (desktop)

marketing.case-detail.contact.whenToUse: Case study bottom CTA — muted split layout, title + description + white form (name + company only)

marketing.why-us.grid.whenToUse: Credibility grid — title with break, row1 (2 bordered cards + 2fr featured media), row2 (3 cards + mobile featured), muted-to-white section bg

marketing.choose-us.mosaic.whenToUse: Company credibility mosaic — title with brand accent, 5-card wrap (2 wide + 3 narrow) + featured support panel on muted bg

marketing.process.timeline.whenToUse: Process timeline — numbered steps with dot markers, bordered cards, vertical mobile / horizontal desktop with gradient track

marketing.calculator.damiat.whenToUse: DAMIAT Index calculator — crop inputs, Rosstat market layer, device toggles, forecast metrics

marketing.footer.minimal.whenToUse: Site footer with link columns, social links, and copyright

marketing.footer.enterprise.whenToUse: Brand footer after contact hero — gradient divider, logo column, 3-col nav/contacts/legal grid, back-to-top

marketing.landing.default.description: Standard SaaS landing page section order

marketing.landing.saas.description: Full SaaS landing with navbar, social proof, FAQ, and newsletter

marketing.landing.enterprise.description: Enterprise AICADS showcase landing — overlay navbar, brand hero, events, features, CTA, footer
marketing.landing.enterprise.notes: Use LandingPageTemplate with navbar.overlay=true; hero.appearance auto-coerces to brand when overlay is set.

marketing.landing.damiat.description: DAMIAT product landing — yield preservation, ethylene generator, platform, case study
marketing.landing.damiat.notes: Storybook: Screens/DAMIAT Product Landing. UX: calculator → scenarios → device → platform → case (Agro holding).

marketing.auth.login.damiat.description: DAMIAT login page — Cortel console split-screen, brand decor left + white form right
marketing.auth.login.damiat.notes: Storybook: Screens/DAMIAT Login. Split 50/50 desktop; login + password, remember/forgot row, registration hint, legal footer.

marketing.case-detail.damiat.description: DAMIAT case detail page — Cortel long-read with anchor nav and landing closing band
marketing.case-detail.damiat.notes: Storybook: Screens/DAMIAT Case Detail. Photo-hero above-fold (backgrounds.case) + overlay navbar, white intro with brand highlight metrics (no badge), sticky anchor nav + split body, gray stat cards, landing BrandPhotoHeroSection closing with damiatContactHeroContent + damiatFooterContent.

marketing.cabinet.damiat.description: DAMIAT user cabinet — app-shell monitoring from landing scenarios + telemetry
marketing.cabinet.damiat.notes: Storybook: Screens/DAMIAT Cabinet. Sidebar: Overview + Ethylene/CO2/Climate; overview KPI strip + scenario summary cards; scenario views use MonitoringWorkspaceBlock. Landing unchanged.

marketing.admin.damiat.description: DAMIAT admin panel — cases/events content editor, users/passwords, partner logos
marketing.admin.damiat.notes: Storybook: Screens/DAMIAT Admin. Front-only local state; shared schema editor for cases and events; password modals + partner logo CRUD. No API or routing.
